assertions.assertion: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
assertions.evidence: direct quote from action items: A1 - Fix CI setup, get tests running again | short | Platform team | open

assertions.assertion: Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
